ingredients.raw: cocktail-sized smoked sausages or little smokies 14 oz
ingredients.name: cocktail-sized smoked sausages or little smokies

ingredients.raw: flaky salt or everything bagel seasoning 1
ingredients.name: flaky salt or everything bagel seasoning

instructions.text: Arrange a rack in the middle of the oven and heat the oven to 375ºF. Line a rimmed baking sheet with parchment paper or a silicone baking mat.
Whisk egg and water in a small bowl until combined. Pat sausages dry with paper towels.

Open cans and unroll refrigerated crescent roll dough on a work surface. Separate the dough from each can along the perforated seams into 8 triangles. Use a pizza cutter or sharp knife to cut each triangle lengthwise into 3 narrow triangles, {{count}} total.

Place 1 sausage at the wide end of a dough triangle. Roll towards the pointed end, wrapping the dough around the sausage and allowing the dough to overlap. Place on the baking sheet seam-side down. Repeat with the remaining sausages, spacing them evenly apart on the baking sheet.
Brush the tops and sides of the dough with a thin layer of the egg wash. Sprinkle with flaky salt or everything bagel seasoning if desired.
Bake until the dough is puffed and golden brown, 13 to 15 minutes. Serve warm with mustard, ketchup, or your favorite dipping sauce.
